summary: Comprehensive backend API testing completed for Doggy Company / Mira Pet Life Operating System. All 6 backend endpoints tested successfully with 100% pass rate. Login flow working, Mira AI chat responding correctly, Paw Points API functional, OS LEARN content accessible, Pet Soul system operational. Frontend testing blocked by browser automation environment issues but server confirmed accessible.
